name: knowledge-management
description: Sync your Word docs and Google Docs into a searchable local index Claude can use without loading full files.

tools.name: sync
tools.description: Sync Word documents and Google Docs into the local search index.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search across all indexed documents by keyword or natural language query.

tools.name: get_document
tools.description: Retrieve the full content of a document by path or docid.

tools.name: list_sources
tools.description: Show configured sources, document counts, and last sync times.

prompts.name: knowledge-management
prompts.description: Activates knowledge management mode: search documents before answering, surface update notices.
prompts.text:
You have access to a personal knowledge base via the knowledge-management extension. It indexes the user's Word documents and Google Docs into a local search index.

How to use it:
- Before answering any question that might be covered in the user's documents, call the `search` tool with relevant keywords.
- When the user asks what files or sources are available, call `list_sources`. Check the output for any update notices and mention them.
- When the user asks to refresh or update their knowledge base, call `sync`.
- To retrieve a full document, call `get_document` with the path or docid from search results.

Always search before saying you don't have information on a topic — it may be in their documents.

documents_path.title: Documents folder
documents_path.description: Local folder to scan for Word documents (.docx). Subfolders are included.

google_docs_enabled.title: Sync Google Docs?
google_docs_enabled.description: Include Google Docs in your knowledge base.

google_drive_folder_id.title: Google Drive folder ID (optional)
google_drive_folder_id.description: Restrict to a specific folder. Find the ID in the Drive URL when you open the folder. Leave empty for all docs.

sync_interval_minutes.title: Sync interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often to check for updated documents while Claude is running. Default: 60.
